mapper.select: SELECT C.CNO, C.BNO, C.USER_ID AS userId, C.CONTENT, C.REGDATE, U.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM FREE_COMMENT_TBL C JOIN user_tbl U ON C.USER_ID = U.user_id WHERE C.BNO = #{bno} ORDER BY C.CNO DESC

SELECT C.CNO, C.BNO, C.P_CNO AS pCno, C.USER_ID AS userId, C.CONTENT, C.REGDATE, U.NICKNAME AS nickname FROM FREE_COMMENT_TBL C JOIN user_tbl U ON C.USER_ID = U.user_id WHERE C.BNO = #{bno} ORDER BY NVL(C.P_CNO, C.CNO) DESC, C.REGDATE ASC
